thenDo(Consumer<E>) - Method in class org.yschwartz.try_utils.context.CatchRunningContext
Sets the exception consumer for the catch block.
thenReturn(Function<E, R>) - Method in class org.yschwartz.try_utils.context.CatchCallingContext
Sets the exception to value function for the catch block.
thenReturn(R) - Method in class org.yschwartz.try_utils.context.CatchCallingContext
Sets the catch block to return a value.
thenThrow(Function<E, ? extends RuntimeException>) - Method in class org.yschwartz.try_utils.context.CatchCallingContext
Sets the catch block to throw an exception.
thenThrow(Function<E, ? extends RuntimeException>) - Method in class org.yschwartz.try_utils.context.CatchRunningContext
Sets the catch block to throw an exception.
ThrowingConsumer<S> - Interface in org.yschwartz.try_utils.functional
Represents an operation that accepts a single input argument and returns no result.
ThrowingFunction<S,​R> - Interface in org.yschwartz.try_utils.functional
Represents a function that accepts one argument and produces a result.
ThrowingRunnable - Interface in org.yschwartz.try_utils.functional
Represents an operation that runs a task.
tryCalling(Callable<R>) - Static method in class org.yschwartz.try_utils.TryUtils
Starts a try/catch block for calling a callable that may throw an exception.
TryCallingContext<R> - Class in org.yschwartz.try_utils.context
Provides methods for defining the catch blocks.
TryCallingContext(BaseTryLogic<R>) - Constructor for class org.yschwartz.try_utils.context.TryCallingContext
 
tryCallingResource(S, ThrowingFunction<S, R>) - Static method in class org.yschwartz.try_utils.TryUtils
Starts a try with resource block for calling a resource to value function that may throw an exception.
TryCallingResourceTest - Class in org.yschwartz.try_utils
 
TryCallingResourceTest() - Constructor for class org.yschwartz.try_utils.TryCallingResourceTest
 
TryCallingTest - Class in org.yschwartz.try_utils
 
TryCallingTest() - Constructor for class org.yschwartz.try_utils.TryCallingTest
 
TryFinallyContext<R> - Class in org.yschwartz.try_utils.context
Provides a method for defining the finally block.
tryRunning(ThrowingRunnable) - Static method in class org.yschwartz.try_utils.TryUtils
Starts a try/catch block for running a task that may throw an exception.
TryRunningContext - Class in org.yschwartz.try_utils.context
Provides methods for defining the catch blocks.
TryRunningContext(BaseTryLogic<Void>) - Constructor for class org.yschwartz.try_utils.context.TryRunningContext
 
tryRunningResource(S, ThrowingConsumer<S>) - Static method in class org.yschwartz.try_utils.TryUtils
Starts a try with resource block for consuming a resource that may throw an exception.

TryRunningTest() - Constructor for class org.yschwartz.try_utils.TryRunningTest
 
TryUtils - Class in org.yschwartz.try_utils
Provides static methods for defining try/catch blocks in a functional style.
